extraction.one_line_summary: EWING Caleb won a chaotic sprint after NTT chased too early for BOASSON HAGEN, with SAGAN Peter headbutting VAN AERT Wout in final meters.
tactical_patterns: NTT burned WALSCHEID Max too early chasing breakaway for BOASSON HAGEN, leaving him isolated before final kilometer.
VAN AERT Wout positioned himself perfectly off REZA Kevin's leadout then got headbutted by SAGAN in sprint.
BENNETT Sam found perfect third wheel position early but team leadout man mistakenly worked for him instead of COQUARD.

rider_signals.WALSCHEID Max: neutral: showed powerful chase capability but deployed too early by NTT, exhausting himself before finale
rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: negative: surfing wheels desperately after own team burned leadout train prematurely, finished outside podium
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: despite perfect positioning off rival leadouts, lost what looked like certain third win to headbutt interference
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: found third wheel despite chaotic positioning, benefited when someone else's leadout mistakenly worked for him
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: resorted to illegal headbutting VAN AERT to defend position, signaling desperation in green jersey battle
rider_signals.EWING Caleb: positive: won from behind with confidence-based positioning like prime Cavendish, trusting speed over early commitment
